00001| #!/bin/bash
00002| 
00003| echo "🔍 COMPREHENSIVE ERROR CHECKING"
00004| echo "=================================="
00005| 
00006| echo -e "\n📊 1. Backend API Status:"
00007| if curl -s http://localhost:5000 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
00008|     echo "✅ Backend is running on port 5000"
00009|     curl -s http://localhost:5000 | jq -r .message
00010| else
00011|     echo "❌ Backend is NOT running"
00012|     echo "Start with: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python app.py"
00013| fi
00014| 
00015| echo -e "\n🌐 2. Frontend Status:"
00016| if curl -s http://localhost:8000 >/dev/null 2>&1; then

00018| else

00020|     echo "Start with: cd frontend && python3 -m http.server 8000"
00021| fi
00022| 
00023| echo -e "\n📈 3. API Endpoints Testing:"
00024| echo "----------------------------------------"
00025| 
00026| # Test savings endpoint
00027| echo -n "💰 Savings API: "
00028| SAVINGS_RESPONSE=$(curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/savings 2>/dev/null)
00029| if echo "$SAVINGS_RESPONSE" | jq -e .status >/dev/null 2>&1; then
00030|     STATUS=$(echo "$SAVINGS_RESPONSE" | jq -r .status)
00031|     if [ "$STATUS" = "success" ]; then
00032|         echo "✅ Working"
00033|         WASTE=$(echo "$SAVINGS_RESPONSE" | jq -r .data.total_waste_cost)
00034|         SAVED=$(echo "$SAVINGS_RESPONSE" | jq -r .data.total_saved_cost)
00035|         echo "   📊 Waste: \$$WASTE, Saved: \$$SAVED"
00036|     else
00037|         echo "❌ API Error: $(echo "$SAVINGS_RESPONSE" | jq -r .message)"
00038|     fi
00039| else
00040|     echo "❌ No response or invalid JSON"
00041| fi
00042| 
00043| # Test electricity endpoint
00044| echo -n "⚡ Electricity API: "
00045| if curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/electricity/history?limit=1 | jq -e .status >/dev/null 2>&1; then
00046|     echo "✅ Working"
00047|     COUNT=$(curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/electricity/history?limit=1 | jq -r .count)
00048|     echo "   📊 Records: $COUNT"
00049| else
00050|     echo "❌ Not working"
00051| fi
00052| 
00053| echo -e "\n📋 4. Database Status:"
00054| echo "----------------------------------------"
00055| if [ -f "/home/bot4u/Desktop/GEMINI/Mini_project/backend/ecotrack.db" ]; then

00060|     echo "📊 Electricity records: $CD_COUNT"
00061|     
00062|     if [ "$CD_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
00063|         echo "✅ Database has data"
00064|         
00065|         # Check for auto_controlled column
00066|         if sqlite3 /home/bot4u/Desktop/GEMINI/Mini_project/backend/ecotrack.db "PRAGMA table_info(electricity_data);" | grep -q auto_controlled; then
00067|             echo "✅ Database schema is up to date"

00074|     fi
00075| else

metadata.preview:
#!/bin/bash

echo "🔍 COMPREHENSIVE ERROR CHECKING"
echo "=================================="

echo -e "\n📊 1. Backend API Status:"
if curl -s http://localhost:5000 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "✅ Backend is running on port 5000"
    curl -s http://localhost:5000 | jq -r .message
else
    echo "❌ Backend is NOT running"
    echo "Start with: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python app.py"
fi

echo -e "\n🌐 2. Frontend Status:"
if curl -s http://localhost:8000 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "✅ Frontend is running on port 8000"
else
    echo "❌ Frontend is NOT running"
    echo "Start with: cd frontend && python3 -m http.server 8000"
